base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of attract_screen_push_start_bonus_instruction — a ui (hud_readout) from 1981 galaga. 'PUSH START BUTTON / 1ST BONUS FOR ___ PTS / 2ND BONUS FOR ___ PTS / AND FOR EVERY ___ PTS' extra-life instruction — fill-in score values depend on cabinet DIP-switch settings. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 'PUSH START BUTTON / 1ST BONUS FOR ___ PTS / 2ND BONUS FOR ___ PTS / AND FOR EVERY ___ PTS' extra-life instruction — fill-in score values depend on cabinet DIP-switch settings
